name: mece_framework
description: Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive. Breaks problems into distinct, non-overlapping categories that cover the entire problem space.

steps.prompt_injection: Divide the core problem into 3 to 5 distinct categories. Ensure no two categories overlap (Mutually Exclusive).
Review the categories. Identify any edge cases or variables that were left out. If the categories do not encompass 100% of the problem space (Collectively Exhaustive), redefine them.
